name: hs_all_accessible_team_ids
label: All teams
description: The team IDs, including the team hierarchy, of all default and custom owner properties for this record.

name: hs_all_assigned_business_unit_ids
label: Brands
description: The brands this record is assigned to.

name: hs_all_facsimile_thread_ids
label: All facsimile thread ids
description: Thread ids from facsimile invoice emails

name: hs_all_owner_ids
label: All owner IDs
description: Values of all default and custom owner properties for this record.

name: hs_all_team_ids
label: All team IDs
description: The team IDs of all default and custom owner properties for this record.

name: hs_allow_partial_payments
label: Allow partial payments
description: Allow your customer to pay less than the balance due

name: hs_allowed_checkout_fee_ids
label: Allowed checkout fee IDs
description: Stores up to two ids for the checkout fees that can be applied to the invoice at checkout

name: hs_allowed_payment_methods
label: Allowed payment methods
description: The payment methods that can be used to pay the invoice.

name: hs_amount_billed
label: Amount billed
description: The amount billed on the invoice

name: hs_amount_billed_in_company_currency
label: Amount billed in company currency
description: The amount billed on the invoice in the company currency

name: hs_amount_billed_pre_tax
label: Amount billed (pre-tax)
description: The amount billed on the invoice before tax

name: hs_amount_paid
label: Amount paid
description: The total value of non-failed payments associated to the invoice.

name: hs_amount_paid_in_company_currency
label: Amount paid in company currency
description: The total value of non-failed payments associated to the invoice in the company currency

name: hs_amount_processing
label: Amount processing
description: The total value of processing payments associated to the invoice.

name: hs_associated_line_item_names
label: Line item names
description: The line item names associated to this invoice

name: hs_balance_due
label: Balance due
description: The balance due for the invoice.

name: hs_balance_due_in_company_currency
label: Balance due in company currency
description: The balance due for the invoice in the company currency

name: hs_billing_frequency_type
label: Billing frequency type
description: Indicates whether or not the invoice is part of a recurring series (a subscription).

name: hs_collect_address_types
label: Address types to collect
description: The types of addresses that are collected while paying the invoice.

name: hs_comments
label: Comments
description: Comments to the Invoice recipient.

name: hs_created_by_user_id
label: Created by user ID
description: The user who created this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hs_createdate
label: Create Date
description: The date and time at which this object was created. This value is automatically set by HubSpot and may not be modified.

name: hs_credit_memo_applications
label: Credit Memo Applications
description: Serialized JSON that captures the Credit Memos applied to an Invoice. Used exclusively for Data Sync integration.

name: hs_currency
label: Currency
description: The currency of the invoice

name: hs_custom_fields
label: Custom Invoice Fields
description: The custom fields that have been added to the invoice.

name: hs_data_sync_source_details
label: data sync source details
description: Data sync source details

name: hs_days_overdue
label: Days overdue
description: The number of days this open invoice is overdue. Stored as a datetime value but displayed as a relative date

name: hs_days_paid_late
label: Days paid late
description: How many days the invoice was paid after the due date

name: hs_discounts_total
label: Discounts total
description: The sum of all line item level discounts and invoice level discounts applied to the invoice.

name: hs_domain
label: Domain
description: Domain of the hosted rendered Invoice.

name: hs_due_date
label: Due date
description: The due date for the current invoice.

name: hs_due_date_if_overdue
label: Due date if overdue
description: Calculated property that conditionally copies the hs_due_date value over if the Invoice is open and overdue

name: hs_enable_automated_taxes
label: Automated taxes on
description: Whether or not automated tax is enabled for the invoice

name: hs_exchange_rate
label: Exchange rate
description: This is the exchange rate used to convert the invoice amount into your company currency.

name: hs_explainability_agent_enabled
label: Explainability agent enabled
description: Whether or not the explainability agent is enabled for the invoice

name: hs_external_account_id
label: External account id
description: The 3rd party account Id associated with this Invoice

name: hs_external_createdate
label: Invoice external create date/time
description: The date and time at which the invoice was created in the 3rd party accounting application

name: hs_external_invoice_id
label: External  id
description: The 3rd party unique Id associated with this Invoice

name: hs_external_recipient
label: External recipient
description: The recipient of the current invoice.

name: hs_fees_total
label: Fees total
description: The sum of all fees applied to the invoice.

name: hs_invoice_age_category
label: Age category
description: How many days an invoice has been outstanding

name: hs_invoice_billable
label: Invoice billable
description: Whether or not the invoice is billable

name: hs_invoice_class
label: Invoice class
description: Classification of an Invoice, typically synced from third party accounting integrations.

name: hs_invoice_date
label: Invoice date
description: Date of the Invoice.

name: hs_invoice_latest_company_name
label: Latest company name
description: The latest name value among companies associated to this invoice

name: hs_invoice_latest_contact_email
label: Latest contact email
description: The latest email value among contacts associated to this invoice

name: hs_invoice_latest_contact_firstname
label: Latest contact first name
description: The latest first name value among contacts associated to this invoice

name: hs_invoice_latest_contact_lastname
label: Latest contact last name
description: The latest last name value among contacts associated to this invoice

name: hs_invoice_link
label: Invoice link
description: The invoice url link, based on the domain and slug.

name: hs_invoice_payment_collection_method
label: Invoice payment collection method
description: The method used to collect payment for the invoice.

name: hs_invoice_preset_id
label: Preset ID
description: The id of the preset set for this invoice

name: hs_invoice_source
label: Invoice source
description: Creation source of the Invoice.

name: hs_invoice_status
label: Invoice status
description: The status of the Invoice. Invoice statuses allow you to categorize and track billing progress.

name: hs_invoice_status_details
label: Invoice status details
description: Additional invoice status details.

name: hs_invoice_tool_source
label: Invoice Tool Source
description: The tool that was used to create the invoice.

name: hs_invoice_tool_source_id
label: Invoice Tool Source ID
description: The ID of the tool used to create the invoice.

name: hs_language
label: Language
description: Language of the Invoice.

name: hs_last_edit_date
label: Last Edit Date
description: The last time a finalized invoice was edited. This is automatically updated by HubSpot.

name: hs_last_prioritized_date
label: Last prioritized date
description: The last time the invoice was prioritized. This is updated automatically by HubSpot

name: hs_last_reminder_sent_date
label: Last reminder sent date
description: The last time an email reminder was sent to the customer. This is automatically updated by HubSpot.

name: hs_last_sent_date
label: Last sent date
description: The last time the invoice was sent to the customer. This is updated automatically by HubSpot.

name: hs_lastmodifieddate
label: Object last modified date/time
description: Most recent timestamp of any property update for this object. This includes HubSpot internal properties, which can be visible or hidden. This property is updated automatically.

name: hs_latest_content_prerendered_time
label: Latest content prerendered time
description: Latest time of the invoice content page prerendered

name: hs_locale
label: Locale
description: Locale of the Invoice.

name: hs_merged_object_ids
label: Merged record IDs
description: The list of record IDs that have been merged into this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hs_net_payment_term

description: Refers to the period, expressed in days (e.g., Net 30), within which invoice must be paid

name: hs_number
label: Number
description: The 3rd party number associated to this invoice

name: hs_number_of_associated_subscriptions
label: Number of Subscriptions
description: Number of subscriptions associated to the invoice.

name: hs_object_id
label: Record ID
description: The unique ID for this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hs_object_source_label
label: Record source
description: How this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_user_id

description: Raw internal userId present in the RequestMeta when this record was created.

name: hs_owning_teams

name: hs_payment_collection_option

description: The payment collection option as selected in the invoice editor

name: hs_payment_date
label: Payment date
description: The date when payment of an invoice has fully completed.

name: hs_payment_status

name: hs_shared_team_ids
label: Shared teams
description: Additional teams whose users can access the record based on their permissions. This can be set manually or through Workflows or APIs.

description: Additional users that can access the record based on their permissions. This can be set manually or through Workflows and APIs.

description: Slug of the hosted rendered Invoice.

description: The external status of the current invoice. This value is retrieved from a third party and may not be modified

label: Store payment method at checkout
description: Allow customers to store their payment method at checkout.

description: The sum of all line items of the invoice including line item level taxes.

label: Tax calculation ID
description: The id reference to the tax calculation data for the invoice

description: The account tax ID listed on this invoice. The tax ID includes a tax ID type and a tax ID number.

name: hs_taxes_total
label: Taxes total
description: The sum of all taxes applied to the invoice.

label: Test mode
description: Indicates if the invoice is in test mode

name: hs_timezone
label: Time zone
description: The time zone of dates on the invoice.

name: hs_title
label: Title
description: Title of the Invoice.

label: Unique creation key
description: Unique property used for idempotent creates

description: The unique identifier of the Invoice. This value is automatically set by HubSpot and may not be modified.

description: The upcoming dates in which email reminders will be sent to the customer. This is updated automatically by HubSpot.
